expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially cut off on the right edge. The rightmost cards appear truncated, preventing users from seeing complete game tiles.
